headline: Travelers Identifies Most Common Wedding Insurance Claims of 2025
summary: HARTFORD, Conn., June 01, 2026--The Travelers Companies, Inc. (NYSE: TRV) today released its wedding insurance claims data for 2025, offering a closer look at the unexpected events that can derail even the most carefully planned celebrations. The data highlights the top wedding vulnerabilities – including vendor failures and extreme weather – and underscores the importance of having a financial safety net in place.

headline: 1 Large-Cap Stock Worth Investigating and 2 Facing Challenges
summary: Large-cap stocks have the power to shape entire industries thanks to their size and widespread influence. With such vast footprints, however, finding new areas for growth is much harder than for smaller, more agile players.
